calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for William Lehman.

Ms. Ebey provided an endorsed copy of the verification to the supplement to the first account and report. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Dec-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Administrator.

The accounting petition was continued to December 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file verification by her Client of the Further Supplement to First and Final Report, etc.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for William Lehman.

The Court informed Counsel that Estate funds should never be placed in an Attorney trust bank account, and requested an amendment indicating where and what the assets are, and what has been distributed. Ms. Ebey stated that she will file a supplement within two weeks. The accounting petition was continued to December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to call the Court to request a continuance if more time is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
